name: py2rust-ccbr-sidebar-pane-materialize
title: ccbr sidebar pane 物化缺失（topology 不建左侧 sidebar pane）
description: ccbr parses [ui.sidebar] but topology/materialize never creates the left sidebar pane (only agent panes). Port Python sidebar pane materialization: each window gets a left 15% pane launching ccbr-agent-sidebar. Mouse on + ccbr-agent-sidebar symlink already in place.
creator: luck
